originalAlarm.description: Potential leak of memory pointed to by 'eckey'

model:
(define-fun SSL_CTX_set_ecdh_auto () Bool
  true)
(define-fun HAVE_ECC () Bool
  true)
reasoning: 35ae2e259e4.c L24: eckey memory leak. eckey is allocated via malloc at L10 when HAVE_ECC=T, but never freed before return. The source comment at L22-23 explicitly states 'return having forgotten to free the memory'. PC: HAVE_ECC=T (SSL_CTX_set_ecdh_auto cancels — both T and F variants present). No library macros. New bug, correctly constrained PC.
